flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bossier Parish Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bossier Parish Community College rose 51% between 2006 and 2009 (6.6% → 9.9%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Bossier Parish Community College are 30% above 6-year earnings ($26.6k → $34.5k).
